identity.name: Button
identity.description: Stable PrimeNG-backed action wrapper used by current applications and remotes.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

warnings: Legacy tone, styleClass, outlined, text, routerLink, and buttonClick remain for stable consumer compatibility.

identity.name: Card
identity.description: Token-driven content surface with optional heading content.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

warnings: No dedicated automated behavior evidence is recorded.
Public API inventory is not yet fully extracted from source.

identity.name: Dialog
identity.description: Native governed modal with labelled semantics, contained focus, dismissal, and opener restoration.

knownLimitations: Background inertness, explicit body scroll lock, configurable initial focus, aria-describedby, stacked dialogs, Figma alignment, and manual assistive-technology review remain pending.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

behaviors: light and dark modal token inheritance

warnings: The current modal contract does not make background content inert or explicitly lock body scrolling.
A dedicated semantic backdrop token is not yet recorded.

identity.name: Empty State
identity.description: Composite empty-state pattern using shared tokens and the public button wrapper.

identity.name: Select
identity.description: Opinionated PrimeNG select facade with an internal body-overlay policy.

knownLimitations: Invalid state, required state, help text, aria-describedby, richer option content, Figma alignment, and manual assistive-technology review remain pending.
PrimeNG marks disabled options with provider state but does not currently emit aria-disabled on the rendered option.

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

behaviors: light and dark overlay token inheritance

knownResponsibilities: Consumers remain responsible for accessible page composition and meaningful content.

warnings: No dedicated automated behavior evidence is recorded.
